collectiondata.overview:
Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Step into a destination where ancient history, scenic landscapes, and vibrant city life come together effortlessly. Travelxploria brings you expertly curated Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata, designed for families, honeymooners, culture lovers, and first time international travelers. From the calm waters of Halong Bay to the cultural charm of Hanoi and the modern energy of Ho Chi Minh City, our Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata promise comfort, value, and unforgettable memories.

Why Choose Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Vietnam is an easy and rewarding international destination for travelers from Kolkata. Indian passport holders can apply for a Vietnam e visa online, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance and travel insurance for a smooth experience. With convenient flight connections from Kolkata via major hubs, Vietnam remains both affordable and time efficient for international travel.

Vietnam offers incredible value for money. From ancient temples and colonial architecture to emerald rice fields and dramatic limestone landscapes, travelers experience rich culture and natural beauty without high costs. Our Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata are designed to cover top destinations while keeping the overall budget friendly.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Cultural Travelers

Vietnam suits every travel style. Families enjoy relaxed sightseeing, safe cities, and comfortable hotels. Honeymooners love romantic cruises, heritage towns, and scenic views. Culture enthusiasts appreciate local markets, cooking classes, and historical landmarks. Travelxploria customizes Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and small groups with flexible itineraries and reliable support.

Top Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 6 to 8 days Vietnam tour package from Kolkata, covering Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Ho Chi Minh City. This itinerary offers a perfect balance of culture, nature, and modern city life. Travelers explore Hanoi’s Old Quarter, enjoy an overnight cruise in Halong Bay, and discover the historical and modern highlights of Ho Chi Minh City.

For couples, Vietnam honeymoon packages from Kolkata include romantic experiences such as scenic bay cruises, lantern lit evenings in Hoi An, and luxury stays in coastal destinations like Da Nang.

Budget friendly Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata focus on comfortable hotels, efficient routing, and must see attractions, making them ideal for value conscious travelers. Families and groups can opt for customized Vietnam itineraries with private transfers and child friendly planning.

Must Visit Places Included in Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Hanoi offers a blend of ancient temples, colonial charm, street food culture, and vibrant markets. Halong Bay is a highlight of every Vietnam tour package from Kolkata, featuring limestone islands, traditional junk cruises, kayaking, and overnight stays. Ho Chi Minh City showcases war history, French era buildings, shopping streets, and rooftop cafes. Hoi An adds cultural depth with lantern markets, riverside walks, and traditional experiences. Destinations like Ninh Binh bring peaceful countryside landscapes, pagodas, and boat rides through limestone valleys.

What Is Included in the Best Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Most Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing with English-speaking guides, Vietnam e visa assistance, and travel insurance. Selected packages also include cruises, cultural shows, and immersive local experiences.

Best Time to Visit Vietnam From Kolkata

March to May is ideal for pleasant weather and clear skies across most regions. September to November is another excellent season with cooler temperatures and comfortable sightseeing conditions. Travelers looking for lower prices can consider June to August, when attractive discounts are available on Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata.

How to Book the Best Vietnam Tour Package From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert guidance, and dependable customer support for booking Vietnam holidays from Kolkata. Booking early, choosing shoulder seasons, and customizing itineraries help secure the best deals. Ensure your passport is valid for at least six months and keep essential travel documents ready.

Choosing the right Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing a journey filled with culture, scenery, and memorable experiences. With Travelxploria, your Vietnam trip is planned with care, comfort, and complete peace of mind.

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you on an immersive journey through the heart of Indochina, where timeless traditions and resilient spirits come alive at every turn. In Vietnam, you’ll glide aboard a private junk through the emerald karsts of Ha Long Bay, kayak beneath towering limestone pillars, and savor the bold flavors of street-side pho and banh mi with a local chef by your side. In the Mekong Delta, our expert guides will navigate you through lush canals on a traditional sampan, introducing you to floating-market vendors and family-run orchards heavy with tropical fruit. Crossing into Cambodia, you’ll dawn-visit the sublime terraces of Angkor Wat as the sun gilds its ancient stones, wander through jungle-cloaked temples with an archaeologist-guide decoding centuries-old bas-reliefs, and taste fragrant amok curry at a riverside village homestay. Along the way, Travelxploria handles every detail—seamless border transfers, boutique and heritage-style accommodations, hands-on cultural workshops, and insider access to wartime landmarks and colonial gems—so you can simply lose yourself in the beauty, history, and warmth of Vietnam and Cambodia.

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

(Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Depending on the cruise itinerary, lunch will be served either on board or at a selected restaurant in Halong City. Upon arrival in Hanoi, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide to explore the world’s greatest monument—Angkor Wat. Unlike most temples in Cambodia that face east, Angkor Wat is uniquely oriented to the west. As the largest temple in the world, its immense stone structure rivals the Cheops Pyramid in Egypt. Continue your adventure by exploring the Great Angkor City of the Khmer Empire, a symbol of its golden era. Begin at the South Gate of Angkor Thom, where you can admire the breathtaking view of the Tonle Om River encircling the entire city. Next, visit the Bayon Temple, the magnificent state Buddhist temple built in the late 12th or early 13th century by Great King Jayavarman VII. Standing at the heart of Angkor Thom City, Bayon is a stunningly ornate Khmer temple known for its serene stone faces. Inside the palace enclosure, explore Baphuon Temple, an 11th-century mountain temple dedicated to Shiva, built during the reign of Suryavarman I. Admire its intricate carvings that cover nearly every surface. Next, visit The Terrace of the Elephants, used by King Jayavarman VII as a grand platform to review his victorious returning army. Then, explore the Terrace of the Leper King, named after a 15th-century statue believed to represent Yama, the Hindu god of death. After an enriching morning, take a break to relax and recharge with a delicious meal at a Khmer local restaurant near Srah Srang (at your own expense), where you can savor authentic Cambodian cuisine. In the afternoon, uncover one of Angkor’s most mystical and hidden gems—the Ta Prohm Temple. Known as Rajavihara in ancient times, this late 12th-century Bayon-style temple is famous for its massive tree roots intertwined with the ruins, creating a breathtakingly photogenic and atmospheric setting. It remains one of the most beloved temples in Angkor, offering a truly magical experience. As the day winds down, make your way to the top of Bakheng Mountain for a stunning panoramic sunset view from the Hindu mountain temple. Witness the golden hues of the setting sun casting a mystical glow over the Angkor landscape, creating an unforgettable moment. Finally, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your selected hotel, where you can relax and enjoy your own leisure time.

With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, cruise through floating villages, witnessing the unique way of life of local fishermen and stilt-house communities. As you soak in the beauty of this historical marvel, our best on-ground support staff ensures your utmost comfort. Later, Travelxploria handles your seamless transfer to the airport for your flight to Phnom Penh, making your transition smooth and hassle-free. From pick-up to drop-off, every moment is carefully curated for a memorable and enriching experience with Travelxploria.

After an immersive cultural experience, enjoy a delicious lunch before continuing to West Baray, an ancient reservoir built during the Angkor era, offering breathtaking views and a peaceful escape. As you soak in the beauty of this historical marvel, our best on-ground support staff ensures your utmost comfort. Later, Travelxploria handles your seamless transfer to the airport for your flight to Phnom Penh, making your transition smooth and hassle-free. From pick-up to drop-off, every moment is carefully curated for a memorable and enriching experience with Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Northern Vietnam Unveiled: Heritage, Nature & Serenity
packages.overview:
Discover Northern Vietnam with Travelxploria: Hanoi, Ha Long Bay & Ninh Binh

Step into the heart of Northern Vietnam on an unforgettable journey curated by Travelxploria, where ancient charm, natural beauty, and rich culture come together seamlessly. Begin your adventure in Hanoi, the vibrant capital that pulses with history and life—wander through the bustling Old Quarter’s narrow lanes, admire French colonial architecture, and witness centuries-old traditions at the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum.

From the city's energy, escape to the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site famed for its dramatic limestone islands and hidden caves. Cruise aboard a traditional junk boat, kayak through peaceful lagoons, and watch the sunset paint the bay in golden hues.

Next, journey to the serene landscapes of Ninh Binh, often called "Ha Long Bay on land." Glide through lush rice fields and towering karsts on a sampan boat in Tam Coc, explore ancient temples in Hoa Lu—the former royal capital—and soak in panoramic views from Mua Cave's summit.

With every detail managed by Travelxploria—from guided city tours and luxury cruises to local culinary experiences and seamless transfers—this Northern Vietnam escape promises a perfect blend of discovery, relaxation, and cultural immersion.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel to begin your full-day Hanoi city tour. Your first stop is the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ba Dinh Square and admire the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays, but still viewable from the outside). Enjoy a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (exterior view), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the iconic One Pillar Pagoda. Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating country where rich history, stunning landscapes, and vibrant culture come together, offering everything from bustling cities to peaceful countryside. Its breathtaking natural beauty stretches from the limestone karsts of Ha Long Bay to Sapa’s lush rice terraces, while its resilience is reflected in ancient temples, colonial architecture, and wartime relics. Whether savoring bold flavors in dishes like pho and banh mi, exploring Ho Chi Minh City’s dynamic streets, or unwinding on Phu Quoc’s pristine beaches, Vietnam enchants visitors with its warmth, charm, and timeless traditions.

Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview: Picture yourself wandering through the emerald-carpeted rice terraces of Sapa at dawn, mist curling around your ankles like a whisper of adventure. With Travelxploria at your side, your journey through Vietnam becomes an unfolding story—one where every chapter brims with discovery. We’ll whisk you from the dragon-etched limestone karsts of Ha Long Bay aboard a traditional junk, to the lantern-lit alleyways of Hoi An, where you’ll learn to handcraft sweet rice cakes in a centuries-old family kitchen. In Ho Chi Minh City, our insider guides reveal hidden coffee cafés tucked behind peeling colonial façades, and by day three you’ll be gliding through the Mekong Delta’s emerald canals, trading smiles with fruit-orchard farmers. Finally, let us handle your sunset cocktail on Phu Quoc’s sugar-white sands as the sky blushes in farewell. From first-class flights and boutique stays to curated local encounters, Travelxploria orchestrates every detail—so you can simply savor Vietnam’s melody of flavors, stories, and timeless wonder.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

packages.overview:
Feel the warm sun on your face as you step into Vietnam’s kaleidoscope of wonders—each moment a new page in your personal travel story. With Travelxploria as your guide, you’ll glide past emerald rice terraces in Sapa aboard a private air-conditioned coach, the morning mist swirling around terraces that seem sculpted by ancient hands. We’ll sail you through Ha Long Bay’s otherworldly limestone karsts on a luxury junk, where a chef prepares a feast of freshly caught seafood as the sun dips below the horizon in a blaze of amber and gold.

In Hanoi’s Old Quarter, our expert local storyteller leads you down winding lantern-lit alleyways to hidden pho stalls and rooftop cafés, sharing tales of emperors and revolutionaries as you sip on egg coffee. Then trade the city buzz for the rhythmic waterways of the Mekong Delta—paddle a sampan past coconut groves, barter for exotic fruits at floating markets, and toast with orchard farmers over fresh sugar-cane juice.

Finally, let Travelxploria carry you off to Phu Quoc’s powdery beaches, where a beachfront villa awaits with chilled cocktails and silk-soft sands under a canopy of stars. From seamless first-class flights and boutique accommodations to intimate encounters with Vietnam’s vibrant heart, every detail is curated so you can simply lose—and find—yourself in this land of timeless charm.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh – Half Day City Tour","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

packages.overview:
Feel Hanoi’s heartbeat as you arrive at dawn, greeted by Travelxploria’s storyteller-guide who leads you through a gentle tai chi session beside the emerald mirror of Hoan Kiem Lake. Lantern-lit alleys beckon next: follow the scent of simmering pho to hidden family-run stalls, then slip into a century-old café for velvety egg coffee behind peeling colonial shutters. Wander the cobblestone lanes of the French Quarter, where flowering bougainvillea drapes over Art Deco villas and lacquer artisans open their studios just for you, unveiling the secrets of their craft.

When the city’s energy meets your wanderlust, Travelxploria whisks you northward in a private, air-conditioned coach to Sapa’s mist-cloaked highlands. Here, jade-green rice terraces ripple like silk across mountain slopes, and local H’mong and Dao women in vibrant brocades welcome you into hidden trails. Pause at a hill-tribe homestay to sip home-brewed corn wine and savor forest mushrooms with sticky rice cooked in banana leaves—an authentic taste of mountain life. In the afternoon haze, explore ridge-top markets where hand-woven textiles and intricate silver jewelry glimmer beneath the sun.

As twilight drapes the valley in gold, return to your boutique lodge perched on a scenic ridgeline. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame the terraced fields fading into mist, and a warm lantern-lit dinner of regional specialties awaits. From the lantern-lit streets of Hanoi to the emerald heights of Sapa, every moment is curated by Travelxploria—seamless transport, hand-picked stays, and insider encounters that bring Vietnam’s timeless traditions vividly to life.

packages.package_name: Wonders of Vietnam: From Saigon to Sapa
packages.overview:
Explore Vietnam with Travelxploria – A Journey Through Culture, Nature & Timeless Charm

Vietnam is a land where every landscape tells a story and every street hums with life. With Travelxploria, discover a Southeast Asian gem known for its breathtaking natural wonders, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to the emerald rice terraces of Sapa and the tranquil shores of Da Nang, Vietnam’s beauty unfolds in every direction.

Step back in time as you explore ancient temples, French colonial avenues, and poignant war-era landmarks—each offering insight into a nation shaped by resilience and heritage. In the dynamic cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh, tradition meets modernity, where bustling street markets, motorbike-packed avenues, and rooftop cafes coexist in perfect harmony.

And of course, no journey is complete without tasting Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine—bursting with fresh herbs, bold flavors, and stories in every dish. From warm smiles to cultural riches, Vietnam welcomes you with open arms.

Let’s fly to your dream destination—with Travelxploria, your Vietnam adventure awaits.

[{"city":"Ho Chi Minh","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928970552-1740906922813-AdobeStock_341738451-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971259-1740906923260-AdobeStock_507072856-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Ho Chi Minh/1740928971624-1740906923520-AdobeStock_625826732-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival Ho Chi Minh & Half Day City Tour ","day_summary":"

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with our driver, will pick you up at your hotel to begin the Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Upon arrival, you will watch a documentary film revealing the mystery behind the Cu Chi Tunnels, showcasing how they were constructed and how locals survived in harsh wartime conditions. Explore the intricate tunnel system, designed to withstand powerful bomb attacks, and discover Hoang Cam's smoke-less stove, secret hideouts, fighting bunkers, and dangerous booby traps. You will also visit a rice paper workshop and taste special tea and cassava, the staple food of guerrilla fighters during the war. Take a break and, if you wish, try shooting Vietnam War-era weapons like the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 light machine gun. After finishing the tour, the bus will take you back to your hotel. Later, our private driver will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Upon arrival, our representative will be there to pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before starting your adventure with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. At 08:30, our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you’ll take a breathtaking cable car ride to the summit, admiring panoramic views along the way. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden featuring a variety of vibrant blooms. Next, take another cable car ride to the enchanting French Village, situated at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its unique European-style architecture. In the afternoon, enjoy thrilling games at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most attractions, including a 4D movie experience, are included in the tour package. However, certain games with rewards may require an additional fee. After an exciting day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative and driver will warmly welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Early risers are in for a treat as they witness the breathtaking sunrise over the tranquil waters of Ha Long Bay. Enjoy the peaceful seascape and start your morning with an invigorating Tai Chi session on the sundeck, guided by experienced instructors. After a light breakfast, continue your cruise journey, taking in the mesmerizing limestone formations and capturing stunning photographs. 8:30 AM: After a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and driver will take you to the Cable Car Station, where you will enjoy a breathtaking 20-minute cable car ride with spectacular mountain scenery. 9:30 AM: Arriving at an altitude of 2,800 meters, take in the panoramic views, visit the spiritual pagoda, and trek up 600 steps to reach the peak of Fansipan – the Roof of Indochina. Spend approximately 1.5 hours hiking and capturing stunning photographs. 12:00 PM: Return to the Cable Car Station and head back to Sapa town, where the rest of the day is yours to explore at leisure. For an unforgettable cultural experience, we highly recommend visiting the Love Market on Saturday night, a unique gathering of ethnic minorities such as the H’mong and Dao people, showcasing the rich traditions of Lao Cai and Northwest Vietnam. Stay overnight at Sapa Relax Hotel, ensuring a comfortable and restful night.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating Southeast Asian country celebrated for its breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to Sapa’s terraced rice fields and Da Nang’s serene beaches, its natural beauty is truly mesmerizing. The country’s history comes alive through ancient temples, French colonial architecture, and war-era landmarks. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City blend tradition with modern energy, featuring lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam offers an unforgettable experience.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 8:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up for an exciting city tour. Begin with a visit to Linh Ung Pagoda and the majestic Marble Mountains before driving to Hoi An for a delightful lunch. In the afternoon, experience a unique basket boat ride at Bay Mau Palm Garden, followed by an exploration of Hoi An Ancient Town, a historic international trading port from the 16th century. Discover iconic sites like the Japanese Covered Bridge, Fujian Assembly Hall, Tan Ky Old House, and Hoi An Central Market. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Hoi An before returning to your hotel in Da Nang for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":246,"a_name":"Da Nang Arrival + Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Da Nang","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. 08:30 AM: Our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you will take a scenic cable car ride to the summit, enjoying breathtaking panoramic views. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After an exciting day, take the cable car back down and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival in Ho Chi Minh City, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, and our private driver will transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you in the lobby and accompany you on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. This intricate 200km-long tunnel network served as a vital shelter for guerrillas during the war against American troops and stands as a remarkable testament to human resilience and ingenuity. Explore this historical site and gain insights into Vietnam’s wartime past before returning to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy your free time until the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your departure flight home, concluding your memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":244,"a_name":"Cu Chi Tunnel Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Ho Chi Minh","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":"[\"null\"]","a_details":"

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview:
Vietnam is a land of breathtaking contrasts and captivating beauty—where ancient traditions meet modern rhythms, and nature’s wonders stretch from mountains to sea. With Travelxploria, explore a Southeast Asian gem that tells its story through every landscape, temple, and bustling street corner.

Cruise through the ethereal limestone islets of Halong Bay, trek through the misty terraced hills of Sapa, and unwind on the sun-kissed beaches of Da Nang. Dive into history as you visit ancient pagodas, colonial-era architecture, and poignant war memorials that speak to the resilience of a proud nation.

In Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City, experience the vibrant pulse of Vietnamese life, where traditional street markets and age-old customs blend seamlessly with the buzz of scooters and the sparkle of rooftop cafes. And throughout your journey, indulge in Vietnam’s world-famous cuisine and the warm, genuine hospitality of its people.

With Travelxploria, your Vietnam experience is thoughtfully curated—blending discovery, comfort, and cultural immersion.
Let’s fly to your dream destination—Vietnam is waiting to inspire you.

(Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 8:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up for an exciting city tour. Begin with a visit to Linh Ung Pagoda and the majestic Marble Mountains before driving to Hoi An for a delightful lunch. In the afternoon, experience a unique basket boat ride at Bay Mau Palm Garden, followed by an exploration of Hoi An Ancient Town, a historic international trading port from the 16th century. Discover iconic sites like the Japanese Covered Bridge, Fujian Assembly Hall, Tan Ky Old House, and Hoi An Central Market. Enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Hoi An before returning to your hotel in Da Nang for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":246,"a_name":"Da Nang Arrival + Marble Mountain – Hoi An Ancient Town ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Da Nang","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. At 08:30 AM, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you'll enjoy breathtaking views from the cable car as you ascend to the summit. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, then continue to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden with a variety of blooms. Take another cable car route to the French Village, situated at 1,138 meters, and admire its unique architectural charm. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and a 4D movie experience are included in your tour package (some games with rewards may require an extra fee). After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the base and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver will pick you up and transfer you to your hotel for check-in.

Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you in the lobby and accompany you on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. This intricate 200km-long tunnel network served as a vital shelter for guerrillas during the war against American troops and stands as a remarkable testament to human resilience and ingenuity. Explore this historical site and gain insights into Vietnam’s wartime past before returning to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy your free time until the Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria and driver pick you up and transfer you to the airport for your departure flight home, concluding your memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Ho Chi Minh","to":"Ho Chi Minh Airport","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":244,"a_name":"Cu Chi Tunnel Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Ho Chi Minh","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":"[\"null\"]","a_details":"

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a breathtaking Southeast Asian destination known for its stunning landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone formations of Halong Bay to the terraced rice fields of Sapa and the pristine beaches of Da Nang, its natural beauty is truly captivating. The country’s deep heritage is showcased through its ancient temples, colonial-era landmarks, and historic war sites. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City seamlessly blend tradition with modern energy, offering lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam promises an unforgettable travel experience.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

After breakfast, embark on a boat trip with our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria to explore Luon Cave, a stunning ring-shaped pool nestled within an island in Halong Bay, offering a serene landscape and emerald waters. As we cruise back to the Halong Wharf, witness the breathtaking views of iconic formations such as Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock. Arrive at the wharf around 11:00 AM and return to Hanoi by 4:00 PM. Upon arrival, our private driver and guide will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Upon landing, our Travelxploria representative will welcome you and transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

Enjoy breakfast at the hotel. 08:30 AM: Our Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to Ba Na Hills, where you will take a scenic cable car ride to the summit, enjoying breathtaking panoramic views. Upon arrival, explore and capture stunning photos at the world-famous Golden Bridge, followed by a visit to Le Jardin D’Amour, a beautiful flower garden showcasing a variety of colorful blooms. Continue your journey by taking another cable car to the French Village, located at an altitude of 1,138 meters, where you can experience its charming European-style architecture. In the afternoon, have fun at Fantasy Amusement Park, where most games and 4D movie experiences are included in the tour package (some prize-winning games may require an additional fee). After an exciting day, take the cable car back down and transfer to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Upon arrival in Ho Chi Minh City, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, and our private driver will transfer you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.

08:30 AM: After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, your Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria will meet you at the hotel lobby. Embark on a one-and-a-half-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels, an extensive underground network stretching over 200 km, which once served as a shelter and strategic base for guerrilla fighters during the war against American troops. Explore the tunnels and gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s wartime history. In the afternoon, continue with a guided city tour, visiting the War Remnants Museum, where historical exhibits provide insight into the country’s resilience. Then, admire the stunning architecture of Notre Dame Cathedral and the Central Post Office, both iconic landmarks of Ho Chi Minh City. Conclude the day with a visit to the bustling Ben Thanh Market, one of the city’s most vibrant shopping hubs.

packages.package_name: The Vietnam Voyage: Terraces, Temples & Traditions
packages.overview: Vietnam is a breathtaking Southeast Asian destination known for its stunning landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone formations of Halong Bay to the terraced rice fields of Sapa and the pristine beaches of Da Nang, its natural beauty is truly captivating. The country’s deep heritage is showcased through its ancient temples, colonial-era landmarks, and historic war sites. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City seamlessly blend tradition with modern energy, offering lively markets and dynamic nightlife. With its world-renowned cuisine and warm hospitality, Vietnam promises an unforgettable travel experience.

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will extend a warm welcome before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and relaxation. Please note that the standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to hotel availability. At 3:00 PM, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel for an exciting journey to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. On the way, we will stop at Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone peaks symbolizing the five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore a fascinating network of caves, tunnels, pagodas, and towers, including Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Thai Pagoda, Xá Lợi Tower, Tang Chon Cave, Hoa Nghiem Cave, and Huyen Khong Cave, each offering deep spiritual and historical significance. After the visit, the journey continues to Hoi An Ancient Town, where you will have the opportunity to wander through its charming streets, admire centuries-old houses, glowing lanterns, and traditional architecture, and experience local folk performances that bring the town’s heritage to life. As the evening sets in, soak in the magical ambiance before Travelxploria’s guide and driver transfer you back to your hotel in Da Nang, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

Begin your half-day city tour with Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, who, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel for an exploration of Da Nang’s iconic landmarks. Your first stop is the Marble Mountains, a group of five majestic limestone peaks representing the five elements—metal, wood, water, fire, and earth. Here, you will explore ancient caves, pagodas, and breathtaking viewpoints offering panoramic views of the city and coastline. Next, the journey continues to the Son Tra Peninsula, famously known as Monkey Mountain, a stunning natural retreat home to diverse wildlife and scenic landscapes. Take in the fresh ocean breeze and admire the serene surroundings before heading to the Han River Bridge, an architectural marvel and a symbol of Da Nang’s rapid development. The tour also includes a stop at Han Market, where you can enjoy shopping for local handicrafts, souvenirs, and Vietnamese delicacies. At 2:00 PM, the tour concludes, and Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you to the Ba Na Hills cable car station for a scenic ride back to the foot of the mountain. From there, you will be transferred to Da Nang International Airport for your flight to Hanoi. Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and driver will be there to welcome you and escort you to your hotel in Hanoi, ensuring a smooth and comfortable transfer.

","day_summary":"

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an enriching journey through Hanoi with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. 8:30 AM: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and take you to the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ho Chi Minh’s Mausoleum, the final resting place of the beloved national hero, Uncle Ho. Explore President Ho Chi Minh’s stilt house, where he lived intermittently from 1958 to 1969, and gain insights into his life at the Ho Chi Minh Museum. 9:30 AM: Next, visit the iconic One Pillar Pagoda, an architectural marvel built over water in the middle of a square lake. Then, journey to the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, beautifully situated on the shores of West Lake. Continue to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first university, dedicated to Confucius and a symbol of the nation’s scholarly heritage. Later, visit the tranquil Hoan Kiem Lake, often referred to as the heart and soul of Hanoi, before heading to the Museum of Ethnology. Here, you will explore Vietnam’s rich cultural diversity through an extensive collection of 15,000 artifacts, detailed dioramas, and interactive displays. Our experienced guide will provide fascinating insights into ethnic traditions, the making of traditional conical hats, and the customs of indigenous tribes. Don’t miss the opportunity to visit a reconstructed Black Thai house and witness the meticulous research conducted by scientists worldwide on traditional Vietnamese cultures. This immersive tour, led by Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensures a deep understanding of Hanoi’s history, culture, and heritage.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

After enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will accompany you on a scenic boat trip to Luon Cave, a breathtaking ring-shaped pool nestled inside an island in Halong Bay. Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of the emerald waters and the surrounding limestone cliffs, creating a perfectly tranquil landscape. After this mesmerizing experience, return to the main cruise and continue sailing through one of the most densely packed areas of Halong Bay, passing by famous rock formations such as Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock. Travelxploria’s guide will share intriguing legends behind these uniquely shaped islets, adding depth to your exploration. Arrive at Halong Wharf around 11:00 AM, where you will disembark and begin your return journey. Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you on the scenic drive back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and engaging trip, arriving in the city around 4:00 PM.

packages.overview: Picture dawn’s first light casting a golden glow over Ha Long Bay’s towering karsts as you drift through mist-kissed waters with Travelxploria, the air alive with birdsong and whispered legends of ancient mariners. By midday, you’re trekking along Sapa’s emerald terraces—each step revealing a new vista of sculpted rice paddies and hillside villages where time-honored traditions still shape every basket and loom under Travelxploria’s expert guidance. As the sun dips low, Da Nang’s white-sand beaches beckon—you sink your toes into warm, powdery shores before savoring a bowl of fragrant pho at a beachside stall, its steam rising like a promise of tomorrow’s adventures curated by Travelxploria. In Hanoi’s winding alleys, the clatter of motorbikes fades into the aroma of fresh herbs and sizzling banh mi, while in Ho Chi Minh City, neon lights dance off colonial facades, inviting you into night markets pulsing with life. Everywhere you wander, ancient pagodas stand sentinel over modern boulevards, and warm smiles remind you that Vietnam’s true luxury is its people. This is a land where history breathes in every stone and nature dazzles at every turn—Travelxploria’s invitation to have your story waiting to be written.

Welcome to Hanoi – the vibrant capital of Vietnam! Upon your arrival at Noi Bai Airport, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, along with the driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 35-minute drive to the heart of Hanoi, where you will witness the city's charming blend of historical and modern architecture. Upon reaching your hotel, our guide will assist with the check-in process and provide insights into the city’s must-visit attractions. Take some time to relax and unwind after your journey. Please note: Standard check-in time is 14:00, and early check-in is subject to the hotel's availability.
