Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on an enriching journey through Hanoi with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. 8:30 AM: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel and take you to the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ho Chi Minh’s Mausoleum, the final resting place of the beloved national hero, Uncle Ho. Explore President Ho Chi Minh’s stilt house, where he lived intermittently from 1958 to 1969, and gain insights into his life at the Ho Chi Minh Museum. 9:30 AM: Next, visit the iconic One Pillar Pagoda, an architectural marvel built over water in the middle of a square lake. Then, journey to the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, beautifully situated on the shores of West Lake. Continue to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first university, dedicated to Confucius and a symbol of the nation’s scholarly heritage. Later, visit the tranquil Hoan Kiem Lake, often referred to as the heart and soul of Hanoi, before heading to the Museum of Ethnology. Here, you will explore Vietnam’s rich cultural diversity through an extensive collection of 15,000 artifacts, detailed dioramas, and interactive displays. Our experienced guide will provide fascinating insights into ethnic traditions, the making of traditional conical hats, and the customs of indigenous tribes. Don’t miss the opportunity to visit a reconstructed Black Thai house and witness the meticulous research conducted by scientists worldwide on traditional Vietnamese cultures. This immersive tour, led by Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensures a deep understanding of Hanoi’s history, culture, and heritage.

In the morning, embark on a half-day city tour accompanied by a Representative of Travelxploria. Your first stop will be the Ho Chi Minh Complex, which includes Ba Dinh Square, the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays; however, you can still view the building from the outside), a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (view from outside), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the famous One Pillar Pagoda. Next, visit the Temple of Literature, where Confucius, the founder of Confucianism, is worshiped. This historic site also served as Vietnam’s first National University, where many kings, mandarins, and scholars were trained. In the afternoon, enjoy a 3.5-hour scenic drive to Halong Bay, passing through the picturesque Red River Delta countryside with a short break along the way.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a boat tour to Luon Cave, a breathtaking ring-shaped pool nestled within an island in Halong Bay, where you will be surrounded by an absolutely tranquil landscape and emerald waters. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will enrich your journey with fascinating insights into the area’s natural wonders. Cruise back to Halong Wharf, passing through the most densely clustered islands, including the famous Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock, each uniquely shaped by nature’s artistry. Arrive at Halong Wharf around 11:00 AM, then begin your scenic return journey to Hanoi, reaching the city around 4:00 PM. Upon arrival, our private driver, accompanied by Travelxploria’s experienced guide, will transfer you to the airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Once you land in Ho Chi Minh, you will be warmly welcomed by our representative, who will ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel, allowing you to settle in and relax.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam Unveiled with Travelxploria: As dawn breaks over Halong Bay’s mist-shrouded limestone karsts, Travelxploria guides you aboard a traditional junk, where the reflected sunrise dances on tranquil waters and ancient maritime legends come alive. By mid-morning, you’re wandering through Sapa’s emerald rice terraces—each terraced ridge revealing local hill-tribe villages where centuries-old traditions still flourish under our expert care. When the sun kisses the horizon, Da Nang’s powdery beaches invite you to unwind, toes in the sand, before savoring steaming bowls of pho and banh mi at a beachfront stall hand-picked by Travelxploria’s culinary connoisseurs. In Hanoi’s labyrinthine alleys, the aroma of fresh herbs mingles with the hum of motorbikes, and in Ho Chi Minh City’s bustling markets, neon-lit facades frame timeless colonial architecture. At every step, ancient pagodas stand guard over modern boulevards, and the warm smiles of local hosts—courtesy of Travelxploria’s heartfelt connections—remind you that Vietnam’s greatest treasure is its people. This is a voyage where history, nature, and genuine hospitality converge into a story uniquely yours.

Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City! Upon arrival at Saigon Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. Enjoy a comfortable 15-minute transfer to your hotel, where you will check in and relax after your journey. Please note: Standard hotel check-in time is 2:00 PM. Early check-in is subject to hotel availability. Once you're refreshed, Travelxploria’s guide will pick you up for an exciting city exploration tour. Begin with a visit to the iconic Central Post Office, a masterpiece designed by Gustave Eiffel, followed by the majestic Notre Dame Cathedral, inspired by its famous counterpart in Paris. Next, gain a deeper understanding of Vietnam’s history at the War Remnants Museum, which presents a powerful and thought-provoking perspective on the Vietnam War (known locally as the American War). Continue to the historic Independence Palace, a symbol of the country’s reunification, before heading to Ben Thanh Market, where you can immerse yourself in the vibrant local culture, shop for souvenirs, and taste delicious Vietnamese street food.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City for a scenic journey to Mui Ne. Sit back and enjoy the comfortable ride as you pass through beautiful landscapes on the way to this coastal paradise. Upon arrival in Mui Ne, check in to your hotel and take some time to relax. In the afternoon, get ready for an exciting Jeep Tour, as Travelxploria’s guide and driver pick you up in a rugged Jeep car to explore the stunning natural wonders of Mui Ne. Your adventure begins with a visit to Bau Trang, a mesmerizing white sand dune desert, often referred to as the \"Little Sahara\" of Vietnam. Next, experience the Flying Sand Dunes, where you can try sandboarding or simply admire the breathtaking golden dunes. Continue to the Mui Ne Fishing Village, where you can witness the daily lives of local fishermen and see colorful boats lining the shore. Finally, take a peaceful walk through the Fairy Stream, a shallow, red-colored waterway surrounded by unique rock formations, creating a surreal landscape. After an unforgettable afternoon of exploration, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel, ensuring a comfortable and memorable experience.

packages.overview: Discover Vietnam with Travelxploria: Step into a land where mist-shrouded limestone karsts rise from emerald waters and terraced rice fields cascade down misty mountainsides—welcome to Vietnam, a tapestry of natural wonder and storied heritage. With Travelxploria as your guide, cruise Ha Long Bay aboard a traditional junk, trek through Sapa’s hill-tribe villages, and unwind on Da Nang’s sun-kissed beaches, toes in powdery sand. Wander ancient temples, marvel at French colonial architecture, and reflect at poignant war-era landmarks that speak to Vietnam’s resilient spirit. In Hanoi’s bustling alleys and Ho Chi Minh City’s vibrant boulevards, savor world-famous pho and banh mi, discover hidden cafés, and feel the pulse of modern Vietnam meeting timeless tradition—all curated for you by Travelxploria, where every journey becomes your own unforgettable story.

After enjoying a delightful breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up at 8:30 AM for a scenic 1.5-hour drive to Mỹ Tho, the gateway to the Mekong Delta. During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. Immerse yourself in the local way of life, observing daily activities of villagers and experiencing the authentic atmosphere of the countryside. Enjoy a serene sampan ride, skillfully paddled by locals along shady, breezy canals, offering a peaceful and intimate glimpse of Mekong Delta life. Next, hop on Xe Lôi, a traditional local transportation, to explore charming villages and interact with friendly locals. After a delicious local lunch, take some time to relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance before boarding the motor-boat back to Mỹ Tho. Travelxploria’s guide will ensure a smooth and enjoyable return trip, making this a truly unforgettable experience.

During the journey, we will stop for refreshments and a short break before arriving at the picturesque rural landscapes of Mỹ Tho. Upon arrival, embark on a motor-boat cruise, gliding along a vast network of canals and channels, where you can soak in the breathtaking views of the Mekong River and its lush surroundings. Cross the river to visit a traditional workshop, where you will witness the fascinating step-by-step process of making coconut candy and honey farming. You’ll also have the chance to sample these local delicacies while enjoying the melodic sounds of traditional Vietnamese music. In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up from your hotel to begin an immersive Cu Chi Tunnels Tour. Enjoy the scenic drive as we make our way to this historic war site, which played a crucial role during the Vietnam War. Upon arrival, you will be introduced to the legendary Cu Chi Tunnels through an informative documentary film, showcasing the meticulous construction of the tunnels and how the Vietnamese people survived in extreme wartime conditions. With your expert guide, descend into the underground labyrinth, designed to withstand relentless bombings from the US military. You will explore the Hoang Cam smoke-less stove, a unique wartime cooking system, as well as secret hideouts and fighting bunkers where soldiers strategized. Witness dangerous booby traps skillfully designed for defense and visit the rice paper workshop to observe the traditional process of making rice paper. Afterward, enjoy a light snack of special tea and cassava, a staple diet of guerrilla fighters during the war. For those seeking an adrenaline rush, you have the option to try shooting a variety of Vietnam War-era weapons such as the M16 rifle, AK-47, or M60 machine gun (at your own cost). Following an insightful and thrilling experience, Travelxploria’s guide and driver will transfer you back to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring a comfortable and memorable journey.

packages.overview: Journey Through Vietnam with Travelxploria: Imagine gliding past towering limestone pillars in Ha Long Bay as dawn’s rosy light turns the sea to liquid gold, then trading your boat for a winding path through Sapa’s emerald staircases, where misty mornings reveal H’mong villages nestled among terraced fields. Let Travelxploria whisk you to Da Nang’s sun-drenched shores, where gentle waves lap pristine sands and seaside cafes serve fresh seafood straight from the ocean. Venture into the heart of history in Hoi An’s lantern-lit lantern streets, wander beneath Vietnam’s oldest pagoda spires, and feel the echoes of the past in the crumbling elegance of French colonial buildings. In the bustling lanes of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City, savor street-side banh xeo and sip cooling coconut water as scooters dart by in a symphony of motion. Through every region—from mountain highlands to coastal plains—Travelxploria blends authentic encounters, hidden gems, and seamless comfort, crafting a Vietnam adventure that pulses with life, flavor, and unforgettable moments.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

In the morning, embark on a half-day city tour accompanied by a Representative of Travelxploria. Your first stop will be the Ho Chi Minh Complex, which includes Ba Dinh Square, the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays; however, you can still view the building from the outside), a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (view from outside), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the famous One Pillar Pagoda. Next, visit the Temple of Literature, where Confucius, the founder of Confucianism, is worshiped. This historic site also served as Vietnam’s first National University, where many kings, mandarins, and scholars were trained. In the afternoon, enjoy a 3.5-hour scenic drive to Halong Bay, passing through the picturesque Red River Delta countryside with a short break along the way.

After enjoying breakfast on board, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will accompany you on a scenic boat trip to Luon Cave, a breathtaking ring-shaped pool nestled inside an island in Halong Bay. Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of the emerald waters and the surrounding limestone cliffs, creating a perfectly tranquil landscape. After this mesmerizing experience, return to the main cruise and continue sailing through one of the most densely packed areas of Halong Bay, passing by famous rock formations such as Cock-Fighting Rock, Sail Island, Incense Burner Rock, and Sea Dog Rock. Travelxploria’s guide will share intriguing legends behind these uniquely shaped islets, adding depth to your exploration. Arrive at Halong Wharf around 11:00 AM, where you will disembark and begin your return journey. Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you on the scenic drive back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and engaging trip, arriving in the city around 4:00 PM.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a mesmerizing Southeast Asian country known for its breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and vibrant culture. From the towering limestone karsts of Halong Bay to the terraced rice fields of Sapa and the serene beaches of Da Nang, the country's natural beauty is truly captivating. Its history is deeply embedded in ancient temples, French colonial architecture, and war-era landmarks that offer glimpses into its resilient past. Bustling cities like Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City showcase a perfect fusion of tradition and modernity, where street markets, motorbike-filled streets, and dynamic nightlife thrive. With its world-renowned cuisine, warm hospitality, and diverse cultural heritage, Vietnam promises an unforgettable travel experience for every visitor.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Hanoi\"]","inserted_id":"[225]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI ARRIVAL – HANOI HALF DAY CITY TOUR/1740643736779-Temple of Literature vietnam.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI ARRIVAL – HANOI HALF DAY CITY TOUR/1740643736895-Temple of Literature vietnam 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI ARRIVAL – HANOI HALF DAY CITY TOUR/1740643736901-Temple of Literature vietnam 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Hanoi/HANOI ARRIVAL – HANOI HALF DAY CITY TOUR/1740643736936-Temple of Literature vietnam 3.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Hanoi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise – Hanoi","day_summary":"

Enjoy a delightful breakfast at your hotel before embarking on a scenic journey to Halong Bay. At 8:00 AM, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up and begin the three-hour drive eastward toward this world-famous destination. As you travel through the Red River Delta, admire the picturesque landscape of lush green paddy fields, tranquil rivers, and traditional rural villages. Along the way, Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating insights into Vietnamese farming culture, where you may see local farmers plowing fields with water buffalo or planting seedlings by hand. Upon arrival at Halong Bay, a UNESCO-designated Natural World Heritage Site, board a luxurious cruise boat to explore the breathtaking seascape of this “Descending Dragon” bay. Marvel at the thousands of towering limestone formations and karst grottoes that create one of the most stunning natural wonders in the world. Indulge in a fresh seafood lunch on board, prepared with the finest local ingredients as you cruise through the emerald waters. Continue your journey with a visit to the Surprising Grotto, one of the most magnificent caves in the bay, known for its impressive stalactites and stalagmites. Next, enjoy some free time for swimming or kayaking, allowing you to experience the bay’s beauty up close. Glide past floating fishing villages, where you can observe the daily life of local fishermen, and admire iconic limestone islets that have inspired countless legends and folklore. After an unforgettable experience in Halong Bay, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and relaxing journey.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a captivating Southeast Asian destination, boasting diverse landscapes ranging from the breathtaking emerald waters of Halong Bay to the picturesque rice terraces of Sapa. Its deep-rooted history is showcased through ancient temples, colonial-era architecture, and significant war relics that narrate its storied past. The bustling cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City seamlessly blend tradition with modernity, featuring lively street markets, historic sites, and a vibrant nightlife. Renowned for its flavorful cuisine, warm hospitality, and rich cultural heritage, Vietnam offers an unforgettable journey for every traveler.

[{"city":"Nha Trang","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"NHA TRANG ARRIVAL ","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Cam Ranh International Airport, our Travelxploria representative will greet you with a warm welcome and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel in Nha Trang. Relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you take in the stunning coastal views along the way. After check-in, enjoy your leisure time—unwind on Nha Trang’s pristine beaches, take a dip in the turquoise waters, or explore the vibrant local markets and cafés. Whether you choose to relax or start discovering the city, your arrival day is all about comfort and ease.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an exciting island-hopping adventure. Transfer to Cau Da Port, where your journey begins. Your first stop is Tri Nguyen Aquarium on Mieu Island, a fascinating marine world showcasing a diverse range of sea species native to Nha Trang and Khanh Hoa Province. Explore this small oceanic paradise as Travelxploria’s guide provides insights into the region’s rich marine biodiversity. Next, head to Mun Island, renowned as the best spot for snorkeling in Nha Trang. Dive into the crystal-clear waters to witness a mesmerizing underwater world filled with colorful coral reefs and vibrant marine life. From the boat, you will also have the chance to see caves where sea swallows build their nests, a unique natural phenomenon. Continue your island adventure with a relaxing stop at Mot Island, Tranh Beach Island, or Mini Beach, where you can swim, sunbathe, or enjoy various water sports (optional activities at your own cost). Savor a fresh seafood lunch on the island, surrounded by breathtaking ocean views. On the way back to shore, visit a traditional fishing village, where Travelxploria’s guide will introduce you to the local fishermen’s way of life and their centuries-old fishing techniques. Return to Nha Trang in the late afternoon and enjoy the rest of the evening at your leisure.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to the pier for a scenic boat ride along the Perfume River. As you glide across the tranquil waters, enjoy the lush greenery and peaceful landscapes on both sides of the river. Your first stop is the historic Thien Mu Pagoda, an architectural masterpiece founded in the 17th century, offering breathtaking views and deep spiritual significance. Next, Travelxploria’s guide will lead you on an insightful tour of the Imperial Citadel, the former seat of the Nguyen Dynasty. Explore its grand structures, including the Flag Tower, Noon Gate, Nine Dynasty Urns, Nine Holy Cannons, and the Thai Hoa Palace, each bearing stories of Vietnam’s rich royal heritage. Continue to the Khai Dinh Tomb, the resting place of the 12th King of the Nguyen Dynasty. This unique architectural wonder harmoniously blends European modernity with classical Vietnamese design, making it one of Hue’s most fascinating landmarks. In the afternoon, enjoy shopping at Dong Ba Market, where you can explore a variety of local goods, from traditional foods and beverages to handcrafted souvenirs and clothing. Travelxploria’s guide will introduce you to the market’s highlights, giving you a chance to experience Hue’s vibrant local culture firsthand. Afterward, Travelxploria’s representative will arrange your comfortable transfer to Hoi An. Enjoy a scenic two-hour drive (117 km/79 miles), passing through picturesque landscapes. Upon arrival in Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site, Travelxploria’s guide will introduce you to this charming riverside town. Once a bustling trading port, Hoi An was historically known by various names such as Lam Ap, Faifo, Hoai Pho, and Hoi An.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to the pier for a scenic boat ride along the Perfume River. As you glide across the tranquil waters, enjoy the lush greenery and peaceful landscapes on both sides of the river. Your first stop is the historic Thien Mu Pagoda, an architectural masterpiece founded in the 17th century, offering breathtaking views and deep spiritual significance. Next, Travelxploria’s guide will lead you on an insightful tour of the Imperial Citadel, the former seat of the Nguyen Dynasty. Explore its grand structures, including the Flag Tower, Noon Gate, Nine Dynasty Urns, Nine Holy Cannons, and the Thai Hoa Palace, each bearing stories of Vietnam’s rich royal heritage. Continue to the Khai Dinh Tomb, the resting place of the 12th King of the Nguyen Dynasty. This unique architectural wonder harmoniously blends European modernity with classical Vietnamese design, making it one of Hue’s most fascinating landmarks. In the afternoon, enjoy shopping at Dong Ba Market, where you can explore a variety of local goods, from traditional foods and beverages to handcrafted souvenirs and clothing. Travelxploria’s guide will introduce you to the market’s highlights, giving you a chance to experience Hue’s vibrant local culture firsthand. Afterward, Travelxploria’s representative will arrange your comfortable transfer to Hoi An. Enjoy a scenic two-hour drive (117 km/79 miles), passing through picturesque landscapes. Upon arrival in Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site, Travelxploria’s guide will introduce you to this charming riverside town. Once a bustling trading port, Hoi An was historically known by various names such as Lam Ap, Faifo, Hoai Pho, and Hoi An.

Discover the charm of central Vietnam on a day trip that begins with a visit to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its lantern-lit streets, centuries-old architecture, vibrant markets, and peaceful riverside ambiance that beautifully blends Vietnamese, Chinese, and Japanese influences, before heading just a few kilometers away to the lush and tranquil Bay Mau Coconut Village—also known as Cam Thanh—where you’ll glide through a vast water coconut forest in a traditional round bamboo basket boat, learn about local fishing techniques, enjoy lively basket boat performances, and even try your hand at crab catching, all while soaking in the serene beauty and cultural richness of the region, making this immersive journey a perfect fusion of history, nature, and authentic Vietnamese rural life in one unforgettable experience.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

packages.overview: Touch down in Vietnam and let Travelxploria whisk you straight into the heart of Hoi An’s enchanting Bay Mau Coconut Forest, where you’ll glide along winding waterways in a traditional sampan, paddle through emerald-hued channels beneath towering coconut palms, and watch local farmers harvest clattering buckets of fresh fruit—all narrated by your expert guide who brings the rhythms of rural life to vivid life. After a riverside lunch of banh xeo and tangy fish sauce, we’ll transfer you to the mist-clad heights of Ba Na Hills, where Travelxploria’s VIP access ensures you board one of the world’s longest cable cars without delay; soar above verdant valleys to explore the fairy-tale French village, stroll the iconic Golden Bridge held aloft by giant stone hands, and wander flower-draped terraces before sipping vintage vino in the century-old wine cellar. Every detail—from seamless transfers to insider storytelling—is curated by Travelxploria so you can lose yourself in Vietnam’s timeless magic without a single logistical worry.

[{"city":"Hoi An","country":"Vietnam","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hoi An/1744962877095-AdobeStock_320943462.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hoi An/1744962878463-AdobeStock_602841894.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hoi An/1744962878535-AdobeStock_614043090.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Vietnam/Hoi An/1744962878612-AdobeStock_1190728892.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"DANANG ARRIVAL -HOIAN ","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Da Nang International Airport, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will warmly welcome you. From here, embark on a fascinating journey to explore Da Nang’s cultural and historical treasures. Your first stop is the Cham Sculpture Museum, where Travelxploria’s guide will provide insights into the rich history, culture, and artistic heritage of the Cham civilization. Admire the exquisite sculptures—masterpieces of human craftsmanship—that reflect the spiritual and cultural depth of the Cham people. Next, drive to the renowned Marble Mountains, a breathtaking cluster of five limestone and marble hills named after the five elements—Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, and Earth. As a well-known pilgrimage site, Marble Mountains feature peaks, ancient caves, tunnels, and sacred temples waiting to be explored. Learn about the area's long-standing tradition of stone-cutting and sculpture, a craft deeply embedded in the local culture. After exploring Marble Mountains, Travelxploria’s representative will accompany you on a scenic transfer to Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage Site. Nestled along the Thu Bon River in Quang Nam Province, about 30 km south of Da Nang, Hoi An is a charming old town that once thrived as a major trading port. Over the centuries, it was known by various names, including Lam Ap, Faifo, Hoai Pho, and Hoi An. Stroll through its lantern-lit streets, soak in its timeless beauty, and discover its rich cultural blend.

In the morning, after checking out from your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an exciting excursion to the Bay Mau Coconut Forest. Here, immerse yourself in a unique cultural experience as you hop into a traditional round bamboo boat. With guidance from the locals, learn the skillful art of rowing and witness the fascinating fishing techniques used by Vietnamese fishermen for generations. After this memorable experience, return to Hoi An Ancient Town, where Travelxploria’s guide will take you on a heritage walking tour. Explore the iconic Japanese Covered Bridge, admire the ornate Chinese Assembly Halls, visit the Sa Huynh Museum to learn about ancient civilizations, and stop by the Chinese Temple and the bustling local market. Hoi An is also renowned for its shopping, offering high-quality tailoring services at reasonable prices. In the afternoon, visit a traditional lantern workshop, where you’ll witness the meticulous craftsmanship behind Hoi An’s famous colorful lanterns. Local artisans will guide you through the lantern-making process, and with your guide’s assistance, you can try your hand at creating your own lantern to take home as a souvenir (optional activity, $5 per person). After completing your exploration of Hoi An, Travelxploria’s representative will arrange your comfortable transfer to Da Nang. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and unwind before enjoying a delightful dinner.

Good morning, Da Nang! After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ba Na Hills, located just 25 km from Da Nang city center. Enjoy a scenic 35-minute drive to the Ba Na Hills Mountain Base, where your adventure begins. Upon arrival, check in at the Cable Car Station to experience the world’s longest cable car route. As you ascend, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the lush mountains, rolling hills, and the majestic Truong Son Mountain Range. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Bridge, an architectural marvel held up by giant stone hands, offering spectacular views of the surrounding landscapes. Continue exploring the charming Old French Villas, visit Nui Chua, and conquer the mountain peak at an altitude of 1,487 meters. Next, board the mountain climbing train to visit the Flower Garden, home to a vibrant collection of beautiful blossoms. Then, explore Linh Ung Pagoda, where Travelxploria’s guide will share insights into Buddhism and the cultural significance of this sacred site. Visit the Wine Tunnel, where you can see a collection of aged wines stored for many years. Enjoy a delicious buffet lunch at a restaurant before heading to Fantasy Park Amusement Center. Have fun with various thrilling games and 4D movies—most of the attractions are included in your tour package, except for games with prizes, which require an additional fee. After a fun-filled day, take the cable car back to the main gate and transfer to Da Nang city. On the way, pass by the famous Dragon Bridge for a quick photo stop before enjoying shopping at Han Market, a popular spot for souvenirs, handicrafts, and local specialties.

packages.overview: Vietnam is a stunning Southeast Asian country known for its diverse landscapes, from the emerald waters of Halong Bay to the lush rice terraces of Sapa. Its rich history is reflected in ancient temples, colonial architecture, and war relics that tell the story of its past. The bustling cities of Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City offer a mix of tradition and modernity, with vibrant street markets and dynamic nightlife. With its delicious cuisine, warm hospitality, and unique cultural heritage, Vietnam promises an unforgettable experience for every traveler.

After breakfast at the hotel, check out and transfer to Tuan Chau Harbor with the Best Travel Agency of Travelxploria. Board the day cruise, where you will be welcomed with a short briefing before setting sail. Your first stop is the stunning Thien Cung Cave (Heaven Palace Cave), where thousands of stalactites and stalagmites are illuminated by colorful neon lights, creating a magical atmosphere. After an hour exploring the \"Heaven Palace,\" return to the boat for a scenic cruise through the World Nature Heritage site, passing by famous limestone formations such as Incense Bowl Islet, Cock Fighting Islets, Sail Islet, and Turtle Island. At 12:00 noon, disembark and board your vehicle for a return journey to Hanoi, with stopovers at a Ceramic and Hand Embroidery Workshop along the way.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel to begin your full-day Hanoi city tour. Your first stop is the Ho Chi Minh Complex, where you will visit Ba Dinh Square and admire the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays, but still viewable from the outside). Enjoy a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (exterior view), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the iconic One Pillar Pagoda. Next, explore the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, where Confucius is worshiped and generations of scholars were trained. In the afternoon, visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, the oldest pagoda in Vietnam, before stopping at the grand Hanoi Opera House for photos. Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake and enjoy free shopping at Dong Xuan Market and surrounding streets, filled with specialty shops.

In the morning, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide will pick you up from your hotel for a scenic transfer from Hanoi to Sapa via the Noi Bai-Lao Cai Expressway. The journey takes approximately five hours, offering picturesque views of northern Vietnam’s landscapes. Upon arrival in Lao Cai, Sapa, enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant before continuing your adventure. Travelxploria’s guide will then escort you to the Black Hmong’s village, where you will begin a fascinating sightseeing tour. Your first stop is the minority village of Cat Cat, where you will witness the vibrant culture of the Black Hmong people. Admire their traditional attire, including indigo tunics, leggings, pleated skirts, and silver-studded jackets. Engage with the local community to learn about their unique customs and way of life, which have remained largely unchanged for generations. As part of the experience, enjoy a captivating mountain minority traditional dance show before setting off on a scenic trek around the village. After an immersive cultural exploration, return to Sapa town, where you can spend the rest of the day at leisure. Please note that early check-in is not included. Enjoy free time in the evening to explore Sapa town at your own pace.

After breakfast at the hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up and transfer you to the Cable Car Station. Enjoy a breathtaking 20-minute cable car ride, taking in the spectacular mountain scenery as you ascend to an altitude of 2,800 meters. Upon arrival, take your time to admire the panoramic views and capture stunning photos. Visit the sacred pagoda, a revered spiritual site, before embarking on a trek of approximately 600 steps to reach the peak of Fansipan—the legendary \"Roof of Indochina.\" Spend around 1.5 hours exploring, hiking, and enjoying the awe-inspiring landscape at the summit. After soaking in the views, return to the Cable Car Station and descend back to Sapa town. In the afternoon, enjoy some free time at leisure before Travelxploria’s representative arranges your comfortable transfer back to Hanoi.

packages.overview: Imagine touching down at Nội Bài International Airport and feeling the bustle of Hanoi’s timeless energy—this is where Travelxploria’s expertly designed six-day adventure through Vietnam begins. Your private guide will lead you on a cyclo ride through the winding alleys of the Old Quarter, weaving stories of colonial architecture and hidden street-food stalls serving sizzling phở and bánh cuốn. At sunrise, stroll hand-in-hand around the tranquil Hoan Kiem Lake as legends of the Golden Turtle unfold before you, then pay respects at the solemn Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum. Mid-trip, we whisk you north to the emerald rice terraces of Sapa, where you’ll trek through hill-tribe villages and share a home-cooked meal with a local family. Back in Hanoi, uncover scholarly heritage at the Temple of Literature, followed by a private cooking class where you learn to perfect nước chấm and fresh spring rolls. No journey to Vietnam is complete without Halong Bay’s limestone karsts—sail aboard a traditional junk, kayak into hidden grottoes, and savor sunset cocktails on deck. Throughout your voyage, Travelxploria ensures seamless transfers, stays in handpicked boutique hotels, and heartfelt cultural encounters—from a lantern-lit dinner on a recreated royal barge to a traditional water-puppet performance. By the end of your tour, Vietnam’s rich tapestry of flavors, history, and warm hospitality—beautifully orchestrated by Travelxploria—will linger in your soul, beckoning you to return for yet another unforgettable chapter.

Upon arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, you will be warmly greeted by Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with our professional driver. Sit back and relax as we take you on a comfortable 50-minute transfer to Hanoi city. (Note: Hotel check-in is officially from 14:00, early check-in is subject to hotel availability and regulations, and can be arranged upon request.) In the afternoon, your Hanoi exploration begins with a guided visit to the Temple of Literature, Vietnam’s first National University, built in 1070 by the Ly Emperor and dedicated to Confucius, sages, and scholars. Next, admire the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake (Restore Sword Lake) before enjoying free shopping at Dong Xuan Market, Hang Gai, Hang Dao, and Hang Ngang—bustling streets filled with specialty shops selling silk clothing, lacquerware, embroidered linens, and traditional crafts.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":227,"a_name":"HANOI- NINH BINH ","a_type":"","a_country":"Vietnam","a_city":"Hanoi","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

After a delightful breakfast, meet Travelxploria’s representative and guide at your hotel for a scenic two-hour drive through lush green fields and charming villages along Highway No. 1. Your journey begins at Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 11th century. Here, visit the historic temples of the Dinh and Le dynasties, learning about Vietnam’s rich history and its struggles against Chinese rule. Take in the breathtaking views of vast rice paddies and fresh countryside air.

Option 1: Trang An Boat Tour

In the afternoon, embark on a boat journey through Trang An, a UNESCO-listed site. Navigate through a series of mystical caves, including Sang Cave, Toi Cave, Ba Giot Cave, and Nau Ruou, surrounded by dramatic limestone mountains and serene waterways, often referred to as Halong Bay on land.

Option 2: Tam Coc Boat Tour

Alternatively, choose a boat tour of Tam Coc, gliding along the Ngo Dong River. Pass through the three spectacular caves—Hang Ca, Hang Hai, and Hang Ba—while admiring the stunning landscapes of towering karst formations, golden rice paddies, and ancient temples nestled along the riverbanks.

After a memorable day, return to Hanoi, where you will be dropped off at your hotel for a relaxing evening.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Early risers are in for a treat as they witness the breathtaking sunrise over the tranquil waters of Ha Long Bay. Enjoy the peaceful seascape and start your morning with an invigorating Tai Chi session on the sundeck, guided by experienced instructors. After a light breakfast, continue your cruise journey, taking in the mesmerizing limestone formations and capturing stunning photographs. Relax on board as the cruise sails through the scenic bay until noon. At 11:00 AM, disembark and meet Travelxploria’s representative and guide, who will assist with your comfortable transfer back to Hanoi. Depending on the cruise itinerary, lunch will be served either on board or at a selected restaurant in Halong City. Upon arrival in Hanoi, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

packages.overview: Imagine touching down at Nội Bài International Airport and instantly sensing Vietnam’s vibrant pulse—this is where Travelxploria’s expertly curated seven-day odyssey begins. Your private guide whisks you through Hanoi’s leafy boulevards into the atmospheric Old Quarter, where cyclo rides reveal hidden street stalls serving steaming bowls of phở and bánh cuốn. At dawn, you’ll circle the emerald Hoan Kiem Lake as legends of the Golden Turtle come to life, then pay homage at the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum before diving into a hands-on cooking class to master the art of nước chấm and fresh spring rolls. Midweek, Travelxploria transports you north to Sapa’s mist-cloaked rice terraces—trek through terraced hills with H’mông villagers, sharing stories over a traditional home-cooked feast. Back in the capital, you’ll explore the scholarly Temple of Literature, then board an overnight cruise on Halong Bay’s otherworldly limestone karsts. Glide in a wooden junk through hidden grottoes, kayak into sea caves, and toast the sunset with a glass of Vietnamese iced coffee on deck. Throughout your journey, seamless transfers, handpicked boutique lodgings, and authentic cultural encounters—from a lantern-lit dinner on a royal-style barge to a spellbinding water-puppet show—are all orchestrated by Travelxploria. By the final day, Vietnam’s breathtaking landscapes, rich tapestry of traditions, and warm hospitality—woven together by Travelxploria’s meticulous care—will linger in your heart, calling you back for another unforgettable adventure.

Your first stop will be the Ho Chi Minh Complex, which includes Ba Dinh Square, the President Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum (closed on Mondays and Fridays; however, you can still view the building from the outside), a sightseeing tour of the Presidential Palace (view from outside), President’s Fishpond, House on Stilts, and the famous One Pillar Pagoda. Next, visit the Temple of Literature, where Confucius, the founder of Confucianism, is worshiped. This historic site also served as Vietnam’s first National University, where many kings, mandarins, and scholars were trained. In the afternoon, enjoy a 3.5-hour scenic drive to Halong Bay, passing through the picturesque Red River Delta countryside with a short break along the way.

After breakfast at the hotel, check out and transfer to Tuan Chau Harbor with the Best Travel Agency of Travelxploria. Board the day cruise, where you will be welcomed with a short briefing before setting sail. Your first stop is the stunning Thien Cung Cave (Heaven Palace Cave), where thousands of stalactites and stalagmites are illuminated by colorful neon lights, creating a magical atmosphere. After an hour exploring the \"Heaven Palace,\" return to the boat for a scenic cruise through the World Nature Heritage site, passing by famous limestone formations such as Incense Bowl Islet, Cock Fighting Islets, Sail Islet, and Turtle Island. At 12:00 noon, disembark and board your vehicle for a return journey to Hanoi, with stopovers at a Ceramic and Hand Embroidery Workshop along the way.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

packages.overview: Beneath emerald rice terraces and mist-shrouded peaks, Travelxploria reveals Vietnam’s soul in a single, seamless journey. You’ll drift into Halong Bay aboard an intimate wooden junk, lanterns glowing as towering karsts rise like ancient sentinels from glassy waters. By dawn, a cyclo awaits to carry you through Hanoi’s labyrinthine alleys, where the scent of sizzling bánh mì mingles with the chatter of morning markets. In the heart of the city, our local scholar guides you through hidden courtyards of the Temple of Literature, whispering tales of emperors and poets. Then, trading urban rhythm for mountain serenity, Travelxploria transports you to Sapa’s remote highlands—share jasmine tea with H’mông villagers and learn their time-honored weaving craft beneath starlit skies. Finally, in Saigon’s electric embrace, rooftop cocktails toast against neon skyscrapers, and an evening street-food expedition unveils the spicy harmony of nước sâm and bánh xèo. Throughout every moment, from private limousines to handpicked boutique hideaways and heartfelt encounters, Travelxploria curates an odyssey that blends Vietnam’s storied past with its vibrant present—leaving you spellbound and yearning to return.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide, along with your driver, will pick you up for an unforgettable journey to Ninh Binh, located 90 km south of Hanoi. This region was once the capital of ancient Vietnam before Hanoi took its leading role in the 11th century. Your first stop is Tam Coc, often referred to as “Halong Bay on Land” due to its breathtaking limestone karsts that rise dramatically from lush green rice fields. Board a traditional sampan boat for a serene ride through the Tam Coc Caves, where you’ll be surrounded by spectacular rock formations and tranquil waters. Travelxploria’s guide will share fascinating stories about the area’s geological wonders and cultural significance. Next, continue to Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam in the 10th century, where you will visit the historic temples of King Dinh and King Le. These beautifully preserved structures are known for their intricate wooden carvings and provide insight into Vietnam’s royal past. Walk through the remains of the ancient royal palace and imagine life in Vietnam’s earliest dynasties as your guide brings history to life. After a day of cultural exploration and natural beauty, Travelxploria’s guide will accompany you back to Hanoi, ensuring a comfortable and enriching journey.

Begin your day in Hanoi with a warm greeting from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, set off on a scenic drive to Ha Long Bay, where emerald waters and towering limestone karsts await. Board a luxury cruise and sail through this UNESCO World Heritage Site, marveling at breathtaking landscapes while enjoying a freshly prepared seafood lunch onboard. Explore hidden caves, kayak through tranquil waters, or simply relax on the sundeck as nature’s beauty unfolds around you. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures everything runs smoothly, from comfortable transfers to personalized assistance. As the cruise concludes, Travelxploria guarantees a hassle-free return to Hanoi, allowing you to unwind and reflect on an unforgettable day. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, your Ha Long Bay experience is nothing short of magical.

After a hearty breakfast, bid farewell to the bustling streets of Hanoi as you board a domestic flight to the serene tropical island of Phu Quoc, known for its crystal-clear waters, white sandy beaches, and lush greenery. Upon arrival, you’ll be warmly greeted and transferred to your beachside resort, where you can relax and soak in the tranquil vibes of this island paradise. The rest of the day is at your leisure—perfect for unwinding by the pool, strolling along the pristine shoreline, or enjoying a refreshing drink as you watch the waves roll in. You may also choose to indulge in a soothing spa treatment or sample fresh seafood at a beachfront restaurant. Whether you’re looking to relax and recharge or explore the nearby markets and beach bars, this free day offers the perfect balance of calm and charm to ease into the tropical pace of Phu Quoc.

With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, hop aboard a speedboat and set off toward the island’s most stunning coral reefs. Feel the thrill as you dive into crystal-clear waters, exploring vibrant marine life beneath the surface. Our best on-ground support staff ensures your comfort, providing high-quality snorkeling gear and expert guidance at every step. After a morning of underwater exploration, savor a delicious seafood lunch on a picturesque beach, soaking in the island’s tropical beauty. As the day winds down, relax on the boat ride back, knowing Travelxploria has taken care of every detail—from pick-up to drop-off. With seamless logistics and a touch of luxury, this unforgettable snorkeling experience is designed for pure adventure and relaxation. Let Travelxploria make your Phu Quoc dreams come true.

packages.package_name: Whispers of the Karsts: A Vietnam Odyssey
packages.overview: Sunlight dances on emerald paddies as you step into Vietnam’s timeless story—here, Travelxploria guides you beyond postcards into a world where every cobblestone and coastline whispers its own legend. Awake in the mist at Halong Bay, where your private junk boat threads between karst pillars draped in dawn’s rose light, and indulge in fresh shellfish plucked straight from jade-green waves. Swap sea breezes for city rhythms in Hanoi: lose yourself among sidewalk cafés pouring silken egg coffee, then delve into centuries-old alleys to uncover lacquer artisans at work. Next, the lantern-lit lanes of Hoi An unfurl beneath swaying palms—wander, sample rainbow-coloured bánh bao, or learn the tailor’s craft in a quiet courtyard. In Ho Chi Minh City, neon signs pulse over colonial boulevards; you’ll toast the Mekong sunset on a rooftop bar before joining fishermen on a floating market at daybreak. Throughout, Travelxploria arranges seamless transfers, hand-selected hideaways—from a riverside villa to a mountain retreat—and unscripted encounters, whether it’s rolling rice-paper with a grandmother in her kitchen or sharing stories over a roadside bowl of spicy bún riêu. By journey’s end, Vietnam’s contrasts—ancient and avant-garde, serene and spirited—will have woven themselves into your own travel tale, one that calls you back long before you’ve even unpacked.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

At 08:00 AM, your exciting Ha Long Bay adventure with Travelxploria begins as our representative and expert guide pick you up from your hotel. Although the distance is just 1 km, we make a refreshing stop along the way, allowing you to stretch and enjoy the serene countryside scenery. By noon, we arrive at Ha Long Bay’s seaport, where you will embark on a luxurious cruise. Enjoy a welcome drink as our crew assists you with the check-in process and assigns your cabin. As the cruise sets sail, relax on the deck, soak in the breathtaking views, and capture stunning photographs. A delicious lunch awaits as you glide past thousands of islands and islets, exploring magnificent caves, sparkling stalactites, and stalagmites while listening to fascinating legends from our guide.

Depending on the cruise itinerary, lunch will be served either on board or at a selected restaurant in Halong City. Upon arrival in Hanoi, check in to your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! {"title":"Souvik Bhattacharya","rating":"5","publishDate":"2024-11-12","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

overview:
Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Step into a destination where ancient history, scenic landscapes, and vibrant city life come together effortlessly. Travelxploria brings you expertly curated Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata, designed for families, honeymooners, culture lovers, and first time international travelers. From the calm waters of Halong Bay to the cultural charm of Hanoi and the modern energy of Ho Chi Minh City, our Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata promise comfort, value, and unforgettable memories.

Why Choose Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Vietnam is an easy and rewarding international destination for travelers from Kolkata. Indian passport holders can apply for a Vietnam e visa online, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance and travel insurance for a smooth experience. With convenient flight connections from Kolkata via major hubs, Vietnam remains both affordable and time efficient for international travel.

Vietnam offers incredible value for money. From ancient temples and colonial architecture to emerald rice fields and dramatic limestone landscapes, travelers experience rich culture and natural beauty without high costs. Our Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata are designed to cover top destinations while keeping the overall budget friendly.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Cultural Travelers

Vietnam suits every travel style. Families enjoy relaxed sightseeing, safe cities, and comfortable hotels. Honeymooners love romantic cruises, heritage towns, and scenic views. Culture enthusiasts appreciate local markets, cooking classes, and historical landmarks. Travelxploria customizes Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and small groups with flexible itineraries and reliable support.

Top Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 6 to 8 days Vietnam tour package from Kolkata, covering Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Ho Chi Minh City. This itinerary offers a perfect balance of culture, nature, and modern city life. Travelers explore Hanoi’s Old Quarter, enjoy an overnight cruise in Halong Bay, and discover the historical and modern highlights of Ho Chi Minh City.

For couples, Vietnam honeymoon packages from Kolkata include romantic experiences such as scenic bay cruises, lantern lit evenings in Hoi An, and luxury stays in coastal destinations like Da Nang.

Budget friendly Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata focus on comfortable hotels, efficient routing, and must see attractions, making them ideal for value conscious travelers. Families and groups can opt for customized Vietnam itineraries with private transfers and child friendly planning.

Must Visit Places Included in Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Hanoi offers a blend of ancient temples, colonial charm, street food culture, and vibrant markets. Halong Bay is a highlight of every Vietnam tour package from Kolkata, featuring limestone islands, traditional junk cruises, kayaking, and overnight stays. Ho Chi Minh City showcases war history, French era buildings, shopping streets, and rooftop cafes. Hoi An adds cultural depth with lantern markets, riverside walks, and traditional experiences. Destinations like Ninh Binh bring peaceful countryside landscapes, pagodas, and boat rides through limestone valleys.

What Is Included in the Best Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata

Most Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing with English-speaking guides, Vietnam e visa assistance, and travel insurance. Selected packages also include cruises, cultural shows, and immersive local experiences.

Best Time to Visit Vietnam From Kolkata

March to May is ideal for pleasant weather and clear skies across most regions. September to November is another excellent season with cooler temperatures and comfortable sightseeing conditions. Travelers looking for lower prices can consider June to August, when attractive discounts are available on Vietnam tour packages from Kolkata.

How to Book the Best Vietnam Tour Package From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert guidance, and dependable customer support for booking Vietnam holidays from Kolkata. Booking early, choosing shoulder seasons, and customizing itineraries help secure the best deals. Ensure your passport is valid for at least six months and keep essential travel documents ready.

Choosing the right Vietnam Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing a journey filled with culture, scenery, and memorable experiences. With Travelxploria, your Vietnam trip is planned with care, comfort, and complete peace of mind.
